note: String-keyed record index read on `Readonly<Record<string, ActiveToolCall>>` (toolIndex is a string). `R.get` returns `Option<ActiveToolCall>` rather than `ActiveToolCall | undefined`; the surrounding code (lines 639-651) relies on `undefined` semantics via `activeToolCall?.id`, `activeToolCall?.name`, and `activeToolCall === undefined`, so migration would ripple into those null-checks. `R` is already imported in this module (used for R.set/R.values/R.getSomes). Human decision: keep undefined-based flow or refactor to Option.
